title: About Jugar Bazar
body_html:
Welcome to Jugar Bazar

Pakistan's trusted destination for 100% authentic branded footwear

Our Story

Jugar Bazar was founded with a simple mission: to bring authentic, premium quality branded shoes to customers across Pakistan. We understand the passion for genuine athletic footwear and the importance of quality in your performance and style.

Why Choose Jugar Bazar?

✅ 100% Authentic

Every product we sell is guaranteed authentic. We source directly from trusted suppliers to ensure you get genuine branded footwear.

🚚 Fast Delivery

Quick and reliable delivery across Pakistan. We ensure your order reaches you safely and on time.

💰 Cash on Delivery

Shop with confidence! Pay when you receive your order. No advance payment required.

🏆 Premium Brands

We carry top international brands including Nike, Asics, Hoka, New Balance, Adidas, Puma, and more.

Our Product Range

  • Running Shoes: High-performance footwear for serious runners and fitness enthusiasts
  • Training Shoes: Versatile shoes for gym workouts and cross-training
  • Casual Shoes: Stylish everyday footwear for comfort and fashion
  • Court & Indoor Sports: Specialized shoes for tennis, badminton, and indoor sports

Our Commitment

At Jugar Bazar, customer satisfaction is our top priority. We carefully inspect every product before shipping to ensure you receive shoes in excellent condition. Our team is dedicated to providing exceptional service and helping you find the perfect footwear for your needs.

Contact Us

Have questions? We're here to help!

Email: jugarbazar1@gmail.com

Website: jugarbazar.com

title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
body_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about ordering, shipping, and our products.

📦 Ordering & Payment

Q: How do I place an order?

Simply browse our collection, select your desired product and size, add to cart, and proceed to checkout. Fill in your delivery details and confirm your order.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?

We offer Cash on Delivery (COD) across Pakistan. Pay when you receive your order - no advance payment required!

Q: Is Cash on Delivery available in my city?

Yes! We offer COD service across all major cities in Pakistan including Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Peshawar, Quetta, and more.

🚚 Shipping & Delivery

Q: How long does delivery take?

Delivery typically takes 2-5 business days depending on your location. Major cities receive orders faster (2-3 days), while remote areas may take 4-5 days.

Q: What are the shipping charges?

Shipping charges vary by location and will be calculated at checkout. We strive to keep shipping costs as low as possible.

Q: Can I track my order?

Yes! Once your order is shipped, we'll send you tracking details via email/SMS so you can monitor your delivery.

👟 Product Information

Q: Are all products 100% authentic?

Absolutely! We guarantee 100% authentic branded products. Every shoe is carefully sourced and inspected before shipping.

Q: What does "Excellent", "Premium", or "Good" condition mean?

Premium/Premium++: Like new condition, minimal to no signs of wear
Excellent: Gently used, very good condition with minor wear
Good/Very Good: Used condition with visible wear but fully functional

Q: How do I choose the right size?

Each product listing shows both EUR and UK sizes. We recommend checking your current shoe size and matching it with our size chart. If unsure, contact us for assistance!

Q: What brands do you carry?

We stock premium brands including Nike, Asics, Hoka, New Balance, Adidas, Puma, Reebok, Brooks, Saucony, and more!

🔄 Returns & Exchanges

Q: What is your return policy?

We accept returns within 7 days of delivery if the product is unused and in original condition. Please check our Refund Policy page for complete details.

Q: Can I exchange for a different size?

Yes, exchanges are possible subject to availability. Contact us immediately if you need a size exchange.

Still Have Questions?

We're here to help! Contact us anytime.

Email: jugarbazar1@gmail.com

Website: jugarbazar.com

title: Shipping & Delivery Information
body_html:
Shipping & Delivery Information

Fast, reliable delivery across Pakistan with Cash on Delivery option!

🚚 Delivery Timeline

Major Cities (2-3 Business Days)

Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Sialkot, Gujranwala, Peshawar, Hyderabad

Other Cities (3-5 Business Days)

All other cities and towns across Pakistan

*Delivery times may vary during peak seasons, public holidays, or due to unforeseen circumstances.

💰 Cash on Delivery (COD)

✅ Available Nationwide

COD service available in all cities across Pakistan

✅ Pay on Delivery

No advance payment required - pay when you receive

✅ Inspect Before Payment

Check your order before making payment

📦 Order Processing

  • Order Confirmation: You'll receive confirmation via email/SMS within 24 hours
  • Processing Time: Orders are processed within 1-2 business days
  • Packaging: All products are carefully packaged to ensure safe delivery
  • Tracking: Tracking details will be shared once order is dispatched

💵 Shipping Charges

Shipping charges are calculated based on your delivery location and will be displayed at checkout before you confirm your order.

Note: Shipping charges are separate from product price and are payable at the time of delivery along with the product cost.

📍 Delivery Coverage

We deliver to all major cities and towns across Pakistan including:

  • Karachi
  • Lahore
  • Islamabad
  • Rawalpindi
  • Faisalabad
  • Multan
  • Peshawar
  • Quetta
  • Sialkot
  • Gujranwala
  • Hyderabad
  • Bahawalpur
  • Sargodha
  • Sukkur
  • Larkana
  • And many more...

📞 Order Tracking & Support

Once your order is shipped, we'll send you:

  • Tracking number via SMS/Email
  • Courier company details
  • Expected delivery date

For any delivery-related queries, contact us at jugarbazar1@gmail.com

🎯 Important Delivery Guidelines

  • Please provide accurate delivery address and contact number
  • Ensure someone is available to receive the order
  • Inspect the package before accepting delivery
  • Keep your phone accessible for courier contact
  • Refused deliveries may incur return shipping charges

title: Shoe Size Guide
body_html:
Shoe Size Guide

Find your perfect fit! Use our comprehensive size guide to choose the right shoe size.

📏 How to Measure Your Foot

  1. Place a blank paper on a flat surface against a wall
  2. Stand on the paper with your heel against the wall
  3. Mark the longest part of your foot on the paper
  4. Measure the distance from the wall to the mark in centimeters
  5. Compare your measurement with the size chart below

Pro Tip: Measure your feet in the evening when they're slightly larger. Always measure both feet and use the larger measurement.

👟 Men's Shoe Size Chart

EUR Size UK Size US Size Foot Length (cm)
39 6 6.5 24.5 cm
40 6.5 7 25.0 cm
41 7 7.5 25.5 cm
42 8 8.5 26.0 cm
43 8.5 9 26.5 cm
44 9 9.5 27.0 cm
45 10 10.5 27.5 cm
46 11 11.5 28.0 cm

👠 Women's Shoe Size Chart

EUR Size UK Size US Size Foot Length (cm)
36 3.5 5.5 22.5 cm
37 4 6 23.0 cm
38 5 7 23.5 cm
39 6 8 24.5 cm
40 6.5 8.5 25.0 cm
41 7 9 25.5 cm
42 8 10 26.0 cm

💡 Sizing Tips & Recommendations

🏃 Running Shoes

Consider going half size up for running shoes to allow toe room during long runs.

👟 Casual Shoes

Casual shoes usually fit true to size. Order your regular size.

🎾 Training Shoes

Training shoes should fit snug but comfortable for lateral movements.

📐 Between Sizes?

If you're between sizes, we recommend going with the larger size for comfort.

⚠️ Important Notes

  • Sizes may vary slightly between different brands
  • Nike and Adidas tend to run true to size
  • Asics and New Balance may run slightly narrow
  • Hoka shoes typically have a roomier toe box
  • Always check product-specific sizing notes in the description

Need Help Choosing Your Size?

Our team is here to assist you!

Contact us: jugarbazar1@gmail.com

We'll help you find the perfect fit based on your foot measurements and the specific shoe model.
